resources.string: Expose your phone\'s web console to the internet through your own domain (e.g. shakti.buzz) using a free Cloudflare Tunnel. No port forwarding, no public IP, works on Wi-Fi and mobile data.
Automatically start the tunnel when the web server starts.
Paste your Cloudflare tunnel token here
Get a token: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Networks → Tunnels → Create a tunnel → copy the token shown for the Docker / installer command.
In your tunnel\'s Public Hostname settings, point your subdomain (e.g. phone.shakti.buzz) to service http://localhost:8080 (use your phone\'s HTTP port).
For 24/7 uptime: disable battery optimization for this app, enable autostart in your phone settings, and keep PlainApp pinned in recent apps.
Your phone is reachable on the internet through your custom domain.
Tunnel token is empty. Paste a token first.
Cloudflare tunnel binary missing from APK. Rebuild the app.
Log is empty. Enable the tunnel to see activity.
Copied %1$d characters of log to clipboard
